heading: Built Different, Built Better
subtitle: Four reasons thousands of subscribers trust Global Star every day.

items.title: Fastest Fiber Network
items.description: Pure GPON fiber to your door — no copper bottlenecks, no compromises.

items.title: 24/7 Human Support
items.description: Real engineers answer your call any hour — no bots, no endless queues.

items.title: 1-Hour New Connection
items.description: Order before noon, stream by lunch. Our install teams are always nearby.

items.title: Affordable Pricing
items.description: Honest monthly rates with zero hidden charges or surprise fees.

coverage: Serving Dhaka and expanding to new areas every month — check availability in your neighborhood.
